<h1>Modules List<a class="headerlink" href="#modules-list" title="Link to this heading">#</a></h1>
<div class="doxygen-content docutils container">

<div class="header">
  <div class="headertitle">
<div class="title">Modules List</div>  </div>
</div><!--header-->
<div class="contents">
<div class="textblock">Here is a list of all modules with brief descriptions:</div><div class="directory">
<div class="levels">[detail level <span onclick="javascript:toggleLevel(1);">1</span><span onclick="javascript:toggleLevel(2);">2</span>]</div><table class="directory">
<tr id="row_0_" class="even"><td class="entry"><span style="width:0px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span id="arr_0_" class="arrow" onclick="toggleFolder('0_')">&#9658;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">N</span></span><a class="el" href="namespacehipfort.html" target="_self">hipfort</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>
<tr id="row_0_0_" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort_1_1hipinit.html" target="_self">hipinit</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>
<tr id="row_0_1_" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort_1_1hipdrivergetversion.html" target="_self">hipdrivergetversion</a></td><td class="desc">Returns the approximate HIP driver version </td></tr>
<tr id="row_0_2_" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort_1_1hipruntimegetversion.html" target="_self">hipruntimegetversion</a></td><td class="desc">Returns the approximate HIP Runtime version </td></tr>
<tr id="row_0_3_" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort_1_1hipdeviceget.html" target="_self">hipdeviceget</a></td><td class="desc">Returns a handle to a compute device </td></tr>
<tr id="row_0_4_" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort_1_1hipdevicecomputecapability.html" target="_self">hipdevicecomputecapability</a></td><td class="desc">Returns the compute capability of the device </td></tr>
<tr id="row_0_5_" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort_1_1hipdevicegetname.html" target="_self">hipdevicegetname</a></td><td class="desc">Returns an identifer string for the device </td></tr>
<tr id="row_0_6_" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort_1_1hipdevicegetp2pattribute.html" target="_self">hipdevicegetp2pattribute</a></td><td class="desc">Returns a value for attr of link between two devices </td></tr>

<tr id="row_27_38_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__dlabrd.html" target="_self">rocsolver_dlabrd</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>

<tr id="row_27_339_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__sgetri__npvt__strided__batched.html" target="_self">rocsolver_sgetri_npvt_strided_batched</a></td><td class="desc">GETRI_NPVT_STRIDED_BATCHED inverts a batch of general n-by-n matrices using the LU factorization computed by <a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__sgetrf__npvt__strided__batched.html">GETRF_NPVT_STRIDED_BATCHED</a> </td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_340_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__dgetri__npvt__strided__batched.html" target="_self">rocsolver_dgetri_npvt_strided_batched</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_341_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__cgetri__npvt__strided__batched.html" target="_self">rocsolver_cgetri_npvt_strided_batched</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_342_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__zgetri__npvt__strided__batched.html" target="_self">rocsolver_zgetri_npvt_strided_batched</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_343_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__sgels.html" target="_self">rocsolver_sgels</a></td><td class="desc">GELS solves an overdetermined (or underdetermined) linear system defined by an m-by-n matrix A, and a corresponding matrix B, using the QR factorization computed by <a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__sgeqrf.html">GEQRF</a> (or the LQ factorization computed by <a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__sgelqf.html">GELQF</a>) </td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_344_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__dgels.html" target="_self">rocsolver_dgels</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_345_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__cgels.html" target="_self">rocsolver_cgels</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_346_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__zgels.html" target="_self">rocsolver_zgels</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_347_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__sgels__batched.html" target="_self">rocsolver_sgels_batched</a></td><td class="desc">GELS_BATCHED solves a batch of overdetermined (or underdetermined) linear systems defined by a set of m-by-n matrices \(A_i\), and corresponding matrices \(B_i\), using the QR factorizations computed by <a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__sgeqrf__batched.html">GEQRF_BATCHED</a> (or the LQ factorizations computed by <a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__sgelqf__batched.html">GELQF_BATCHED</a>) </td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_348_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__dgels__batched.html" target="_self">rocsolver_dgels_batched</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_349_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__cgels__batched.html" target="_self">rocsolver_cgels_batched</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_350_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__zgels__batched.html" target="_self">rocsolver_zgels_batched</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_351_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__sgels__strided__batched.html" target="_self">rocsolver_sgels_strided_batched</a></td><td class="desc">GELS_STRIDED_BATCHED solves a batch of overdetermined (or underdetermined) linear systems defined by a set of m-by-n matrices \(A_i\), and corresponding matrices \(B_i\), using the QR factorizations computed by <a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__sgeqrf__strided__batched.html">GEQRF_STRIDED_BATCHED</a> (or the LQ factorizations computed by <a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__sgelqf__strided__batched.html">GELQF_STRIDED_BATCHED</a>) </td></tr>
<tr id="row_27_352_" class="even" style="display:none;"><td class="entry"><span style="width:32px;display:inline-block;">&#160;</span><span class="icona"><span class="icon">C</span></span><a class="el" href="interfacehipfort__rocsolver_1_1rocsolver__dgels__strided__batched.html" target="_self">rocsolver_dgels_strided_batched</a></td><td class="desc"></td></tr>
